backend/main.mo: Actor canister implementing user profiles with authorization, storing neuron settings and capped hotkey/proposal attempt history.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old userProfiles to include optional proposalId fields for proposal attempts.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a proposal‑submission UI feature to related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of short summaries for all frontend source files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining light/dark color palettes and global styling tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React app with a custom title and Vite script loader.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component handling authentication, layout, and tabbed navigation between neuron, proposal, and history views.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading states and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/common/CanisterI: Displays the app’s canister ID with copy‑to‑clipboard functionality and hotkey usage guidance.
frontend/src/components/history/Activity: Renders tables of recent hotkey and proposal attempts with status badges and timestamp formatting.
frontend/src/components/neuron/NeuronMan: UI component for saving a neuron ID, validating principals, and showing dialogs for manually adding or removing hotkeys via the NNS dapp.
frontend/src/components/proposals/Propos: Form for drafting and submitting motion proposals, validating input, and showing confirmation dialogs, with backend submission not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing related queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication, loading stored identities, handling login/logout, and exposing identity state through React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating the user profile, saving neuron IDs, and stubbing proposal submission with error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining a retro dungeon-themed color palette and pixel-art utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that initializes React, React Query, the Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/utils/canisterId.ts: Utility to retrieve the backend canister ID from environment variables with a default fallback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters (including hash routes), store/retrieve them in sessionStorage, and persist or clear them as needed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, theme extensions, custom colors, fonts, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project requirements, features, issues, and architectural notes for an ICP NNS governance app supporting real proposal submission and neuron hotkey management.
